gap_findings.description: Turkey makes no commitment on loss and damage in its NDC.
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: IPCC AR6 WG2 Chapter 17: loss and damage is unavoidable even with adaptation; finance mechanisms urgently needed.

gap_findings.description: Turkey's commitment is conditional on receiving international finance.

details.summary: Turkey's NDC lacks a commitment on loss and damage, and its conditional dependency on international finance creates delivery risk.
